---
title: "RSVP"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    css: styles_RSVP.css
---


We would love for you to join us on

### Saturday, 29th of August 2026 at **Chäsalp** (4pm onwards)
\

Please complete your RSVP below by **[Your Deadline Date]**.

<div data-tf-live="01KHJV0AXM3YSVHR8ZJMQXNPD7"></div><script src="//embed.typeform.com/next/embed.js"></script>

---


::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

### Event Schedule

**Ceremony:** [Time]  
**Cocktail Hour:** [Time]  
**Reception & Dinner:** [Time]  
**Dancing:** [Time]


:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

### Dress Code

[Your dress code - e.g., "Cocktail attire" or "Semi-formal"]

**Suggestions:**  
- Ladies: Cocktail dresses, elegant separates
- Gentlemen: Suits or dress pants with dress shirt

:::

:::

### Questions?

If you have any dietary restrictions, accessibility needs, or special requests, please include them in the notes section of your RSVP or contact us directly.
